## Qaid v0.6.1 — Table view by default

The Sebeeta circular **table** scoreboard (from v0.6.0) is now the **default** view. The `List` / `Table` toggle stays, so the classic list is one tap away.

### Changed

- **Sebeeta defaults to the table view** — new games (and fresh installs) open on the circular table. An existing saved preference is respected; toggle any time.

### State shape

No new fields. `DEFAULT_STATE.sebeetaView` flips `'list'` → `'table'`; the key and shape are unchanged.

### Verification

- `npm run typecheck` clean
- `npm test` 238/238 passing
- `npm run build` succeeds
